description: Model the Drax Power Station cooling tower in GeoGebra using the profile points: Base (0, 46), Throat (85, 26), and Top (114, 27.5). The model must feature a polynomial function passing through these points and a 3D surface of revolution generated by rotating the function around the x-axis for 0 ≤ x ≤ 114. Calculate the internal volume and include a text annotation showing the capacity in Olympic swimming pools (1 pool = 2500 m³) formatted as 'Capacity: [number] pools'. Save the project to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/cooling_tower.ggb.
